reason: Rebuild Angola VAT on one reviewed local engine across English, French and Swahili. Lei 14/23 republishes the VAT Code with the 14% general rate, 7% simplified rate, conditional 7% hospitality treatment, 5% Annex I and II treatment, and AOA 25 million and AOA 350 million regime boundaries. Decreto Presidencial 71/25 governs the conditional 1% Cabinda treatment. Article 21 captive-tax treatment is separated from the VAT rate. The change removes contradictory 2% basic-goods, generic zero-rate and generic withholding claims while preserving deterministic two-decimal add, extract and invoice arithmetic. Six unit tests and seven browser checks cover the executable behavior; no protected golden fixture existed, so there is no carried result delta.
